            <tr>
                <td id="Summary18933680" align="left" style="padding: 0px 20px 11px 20px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 18px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.3;">

                            The U.S. economy expanded at a 3.3% annualized pace in the final quarter of 2023, the Commerce Department said on Thursday. Why…
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

                <td height="25" align="left">

<td id="Card18933684" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
                    <a id="Href18933684" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADGDZRLQCSU6WY4374JKQT4HLJCXJEGMXJ6GAVKGUCDKX3YJHLQYHXBMOSUGDFLEDIM7J66KTUHQSCLFDNH43DNGB5IW6V5N3MQ4BK3KDCVC7QDNZ5SLI7BV4RF6ANQ3IIQ4OPIRITQN5YM56ANRPE54MQZNORNFRXI57AXZO4SPKGTTOHUEQGUYYSZGRRNR6VHPE3UPMBZSQC7HXKVGNUBBNJQYZEOGPLGV45BHCGKO5ZFUHGSUVFFLZXJDW5CDCP4AXHKXO6LFIXFBY7NCUL7GMQ4A&d=AIAACPNSDCT5FW4MFVTKPBWFPO6VM2D2K256Y4ATFZMNVBX3347X5F7W3LC56FMDN5YR2W6Q6COWUVAUXKGMZTQ5GFYTCADCBUK3ALLGDCUK77PLQFTTV2ZHSI7LBHLQPYZZ4UGP4E6NVK5PSG5JT3YMNRCPAQG4HG5VOEOBQU32C4JVTGHSSYAP&" target="_blank">
                        <img id="Img18933684" width="295" height="160" style="border: none; display: block; margin: 0px 0px 0px 0px;" src="https://th.bing.com/th?id=ORMS.01f209e7fde3b3484fb24e1fe04dfb4b&pid=Wdp&w=295&h=160&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2">
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title18933684" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="Href18933684" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADMKN22765H5IKZEYTT7IXH2FLSMW7BXYLH6Q5IOCVFLJRWTTTP4ZDHP6O5KBBDOQZPUKVOXJ66YWRQK5TQVH4C5QHFGCEHOMVCKTC7QLNVOFLQC5V6WK4VLA7OEDICR2JGCBWUHOSE3GFFFXNYX2YJI3AZWNU75ZXKLVYMPPSCKLA3ROS3BIG7X3VBTHGFLUUY7TQADJ5S6RFESHZD7IYVIZ6CO7NPY5BMPRQVZF5L4QPH7UCT34E4K2HMOZNC2XMXFHGJUVMEQYRXGJDS363VIJDPY&d=AIAADEGWVEAG3IIB67BINEEENAKKNZVJSKKQVXTPWPFQFAPYHLS6PL3SHJPCJ5HBWQZ4XPXCT475NOPB3N47E2LV53W4HF6E2FCAJ2SR7UDSQWHYFXK2BLSS4QX6SKOPJ5JCAPFY3T3HRZU4C733S4MQMP7OHRWLB34AN4KY2HPIWWVSIZ4WHVV6&" target="_blank">
                        Olympian Maricet Espinosa González Dead at 34
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td id="ProviderName18933684" height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">
                                    <a id="Href18933684" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADKHXH6MUQ52UVESN5HSD3PCLPTWX4KZWT6VW6H7NH4DTWMQNUBQEY6XKQETSECGNG2W7KDLZHZX5FA67BRZFR32KLQB3RH6VIBWIRQY2ZTJE6OTSZDKP4P4FLOHHU2GKEF7H3GTHENDX5VBARMCXT7IPR5WJUBWKX6CUWTEISNTE22NQASQQ4HCOXPJG5I7Q2LXOSQMBRDS77KP6RMWX2Y6II6YGWOHGA6NWHAPS5MLRO2JCUBOSC7TXXPMTSOE3OM6XPNCMQ2QXAQENWEMX6LZBZFA&d=AIAACILUW6F2MFGJ45XM473PTEG2QICCBMSLB5OWBT5E6G2FFV7ZVTNUKCFGSOU36NAIQYYM3EJF46WYFNNQB3URO5TOFW53GZJMMJDOQV7IBNPYIB4X7LEYHAMHGAXRC64FNCGDLWUYBIAJCN4NJBXQQSCNOLLEOUSWM4VJ4FTR252LRBWCETVS&" target="_blank">

</td>

    <td align="center">

        <div align="center" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 20px; font-weight:normal;">
